## Constants

### functions
<div class="padding-left--md">

Utility layer for communicating with app functions.

</div>

#### Properites

| Name | Type |
| --- | --- |
|call<sup>*required</sup>|(functionName: [string](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/String), options: \{ abortSignal, data \}) => Promise&lt;Response&gt;|
